sum: This mod adds a new bonus merchant named Jarnip to the Adventurer's Mart. Like his colleagues Joluv and Deidre, Jarnip sells a variety of unique magical items to aid you during your adventures in Amn.
no: This mod adds a new bonus merchant named Jarnip to the Adventurer's Mart. Like his colleagues Joluv and Deidre, Jarnip sells a variety of unique magical items to aid you during your adventures in Amn.

co.n: Jarnip: New Bonus Merchant in the Adventurers Mart
